Basis and limitation: 600 unique records; 100 scenes x 6 conditions; no missing combinations.
600 JPEG files; consistent Scene###_C# naming; 1600 x 800 pixels.
Values and ranges were checked; item-level construction was unavailable.
Average ranks for ties; all stored TI values matched recalculation.
Labels and intended roles were retained; executable generation evidence was unavailable.
No individual responses, allocation schedule, demographics, exclusions, or exposure logs.
Approval/exemption identifier and consent documentation were not included in the retained archive.
No executable generator, model checkpoint, training log, seed record, or inference history was retained.
The dates and identities associated with original collection and aggregation were not preserved.
Validation, statistical analysis, sensitivity analysis, diagnostics, correlations, and figure generation are reproducible.
